name: 54 x 108" Iridescent Table Cover - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of sparkle to your next event with the 54 x 108" Iridescent Table Cover from Spritz™. This table cover is perfect for any occasion, whether it's a birthday party, holiday dinner, or just a fun get-together. The iridescent finish catches the light beautifully, creating a magical atmosphere. It's easy to clean and fits most standard tables, making setup a breeze. Plus, it's disposable, so you can enjoy the party without worrying about the cleanup.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™.
